## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, private corpus data, generated `out/` files, or unrelated changes included
- [ ] New or changed repository-facing text is in English

## Risk and compatibility

Describe security impact, breaking changes, migrations, or operational risk. Write `None` when there is no known
impact.
